name: jdy_get_flow_approval_comments
description_zh: 获取单条流程表单数据的审批意见列表
description: Get approval comments for a single workflow form record. Returns approveCommentList[] with flowNodeName, flowAction (forward/transfer/back/close/sign_before/sign_after/sign_parallel), comment text, optional signature_url (15-day valid), and operator info. Use 'skip' for pagination (max 100 per page). Rate limit: 30/s.

skip.description: 偏移量，每页最多100条，默认0
